footer.tagline: Your next job, delivered to WhatsApp.

landing.heroTitle: Your Next Job, Delivered to WhatsApp
landing.heroSubtitle: Upload your CV, set your search criteria, and receive curated job matches directly on WhatsApp — automatically.
landing.howItWorksTitle: Three Steps to Automated Job Search
landing.step1Desc: We analyze your resume to understand your skills and match you with the most relevant opportunities.
landing.step2Desc: Define your job titles, locations, and preferences. Set how often you want to receive alerts.
landing.step3Desc: Get real-time job alerts directly on WhatsApp with match scores and quick apply links.
landing.featuresTitle: Everything You Need to Land Your Next Role
landing.feature1Desc: Our AI analyzes your resume and scores each job based on skills alignment.
landing.feature2Desc: We search LinkedIn, Indeed, and more — all in one unified feed.
landing.feature3Desc: Set keywords to include or exclude so you only see relevant opportunities.
landing.feature4Desc: Receive formatted job cards on WhatsApp with one-tap apply links.
landing.testimonial1: I got my current job through Jobleo. The WhatsApp alerts were so convenient — I never missed a relevant posting.
landing.testimonial2: The AI matching is surprisingly accurate. It filtered out all the noise and only sent jobs I actually wanted.
landing.testimonial3: Setup took 5 minutes. Now I get 2-3 relevant job alerts every day on WhatsApp.
landing.ctaTitle: Ready to Automate Your Job Search?
landing.ctaSubtitle: Join thousands of professionals getting jobs delivered to their WhatsApp.

pricing.title: Choose Your Plan
pricing.subtitle: Start free, upgrade when you need more power.
pricing.starterTagline: Perfect for testing the waters. 7-day free trial.
pricing.proTagline: Full power to find your dream job. WhatsApp alerts daily.

auth.signInSubtitle: Sign in to your account to continue
auth.createAccountSubtitle: Join thousands finding jobs on WhatsApp.
auth.termsNotice: By continuing, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
auth.alreadyHaveAccount: Already have an account? Sign in
auth.dontHaveAccount: Don't have an account? Sign up

onboarding.step1Subtitle: Help Jobleo understand your experience to find the best job matches.
onboarding.orBrowseFiles: or click to browse files (PDF, max 5MB)
onboarding.skipWarning: Skipping CV upload means AI matching won't work without a resume.
onboarding.step2Subtitle: Tell us what you're looking for and we'll start searching job boards below.
onboarding.locationsTip: Tip: Use province or country for better coverage (e.g. Ontario, Canada)
onboarding.step3Subtitle: We'll send job alerts directly to WhatsApp. You can change this anytime.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.welcomeSubtitle: Your job search is running. Here's your weekly summary.
dashboard.addProfileTooltip: You've reached the maximum of 3 search profiles.
dashboard.noProfilesHint: Create your first search profile to start receiving job alerts.

profiles.locationsTip: Tip: Use province or country for better coverage (e.g. Ontario, Canada)
profiles.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this profile? This action cannot be undone.

jobs.pageSubtitle: Jobs sent to you via WhatsApp.
jobs.noJobsHint: Once your search profiles are active, matched jobs will appear here.

settings.dangerZoneDesc: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.
